items.title: Boeing (BA) Gains As Market Dips: What You Should Know
items.description: In the closing of the recent trading day, Boeing (BA) stood at $139.24, denoting a +0.27% change from the preceding trading day.

items.title: CVS, Boeing, Wayfair: Trending Tickers
items.description: Julie Hyman takes a closer look at some of today's trending tickers. CVS (CVS) shares pop after the company hired a new CFO and said it would meet or exceed its outlook. Boeing (BA) is in focus after reporting a 41% year-over-year increase in deliveries in March. Wayfair (W) stock plunges after Bank of America analysts cut its price target to $33 from $41, citing tariff impacts on prices. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination here.

items.title: Boeing Tops Q1 Deliveries Estimates as Production Rises
items.description: Boeing on Tuesday topped first-quarter delivery estimates after safety incidents and a strike slowed its plane manufacturing last year.

items.title: Boeing: Trade War Hurts 737 MAX In China
items.description: Boeing continues to eye 737 MAX deliveries to China, but tariffs pose significant risks. Click here to find out why BA stock is a Buy.

items.title: Northrop's Arm Wins Contract to Support E-2C & D Hawkeye Jets
items.description: NOC secures a $24.1 million modification contract to provide continued sustainment and technical support for the E-2C and E-2D aircraft as well as common and unique requirements.
